title: anthemis arvensis var. incrassata
intro: Anthemis arvensis var. incrassata, also known as a variant of the lesser knapweed plant, is a perennial plant that belongs to the Asteraceae family. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antispasmodic effects. The health benefits of Anthemis arvensis var. incrassata include its ability to soothe digestive issues, reduce anxiety and stress, and alleviate menstrual cramps. The plant can be used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and tinctures to harness its medicinal properties and provide relief from various health conditions.
